name: Medic
flavor: Worked example from FRAMEWORK.md §7 — a support unit built entirely from existing primitives. Low Defense and modest Toughness because it adds no offense; recovery is strong.

specialAction.name: Field Dressing
specialAction.summary: Remove up to 2 Hearts total, split between this Little Soldier and one allied Little Soldier within yellow range. No valid target needed.

effects.text: Remove up to 1 Heart from an ally in yellow range.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, remove 1 additional Heart from an allied Little Soldier within yellow range.
